# Paul Tran Studio — Website Upgrade Tool

> Paul Tran Studio is a San Francisco-based web design agency that uses AI to analyze and upgrade small business websites, delivering professional redesigns starting at $500.

## About
Paul Tran Studio helps small businesses modernize their websites using AI-powered analysis and design. The upgrade tool scans any website, identifies issues across performance, SEO, mobile responsiveness, accessibility, and conversion, then generates a complete AI-powered redesign preview in seconds.

The process is simple: paste your URL, get a free AI analysis and upgrade preview, then purchase the full production-ready site starting at $500 with 24-hour delivery. Paul personally reviews and polishes every upgrade before delivery.

The studio also offers a free website audit tool that scores sites across 12 automated checks in 6 categories, using the same standards as Google Lighthouse and modern SEO tools.

## Services
- Free Website Audit: Instant 12-check audit scoring speed, SEO, mobile, accessibility, security, and conversion (0-100 score)
- AI Website Analysis: Deep AI-powered analysis of design quality, content, and conversion optimization
- AI Upgrade Preview: Free before/after preview showing how your site would look after a professional redesign
- Full Website Upgrade: Production-ready redesigned website, personally reviewed and delivered in 24 hours, starting at $500

## Contact
- Website: https://paultranstudio.com
- Email: paul@paultranstudio.com
- Location: San Francisco, CA
